description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult pedestrian figure, with the body and limbs unnaturally elongated and twisted, as if stretched by an external force. The head and upper torso are somewhat recognizable, but the arms and legs are extended into long, ribbon-like forms that trail behind and above the figure. The clothing appears to be a single-piece outfit, possibly resembling a suit or jacket and pants, with the fabric also stretched along with the body. The figure's posture suggests a forward-reaching motion, with both arms extended straight ahead and the legs bent at odd angles. The surface of the object is smooth and matte, with no visible accessories or carried items. The overall appearance is surreal and abstract, making the figure appear as if caught in a moment of rapid motion or transformation.
description: A surreal, elongated adult pedestrian figure with stretched limbs and body, appearing as if pulled or distorted. The figure wears a single-piece outfit and is posed in a forward-reaching motion.
description_view_0: The front view shows the face, chest, and both arms extended upward, with the lower body and legs trailing downward and to the side.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the extreme elongation of the arms and torso, with the head and hands reaching far forward and the legs bent backward.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the stretched, ribbon-like quality of the arms and legs, with the back and limbs forming a wide V-shape.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the elongated arms and legs, with the head and torso extended forward and the lower body trailing behind.
attribute_posture: extremely elongated and stretched, arms reaching forward
